---
title: "CDS 303: Scientific Data Mining"
sidebar: teaching
---

## Chapters

1. [Chapter 1: Data Science, Data Mining, and the Process of Turning Data into Knowledge](chapter-1.qmd)
2. [Chapter 2: Context and Data Understanding](chapter-2.qmd)
3. [Chapter 3: Data Preparation and Model Design](chapter-3.qmd)
4. [Chapter 4: Data Modeling - Regression](chapter-4.qmd)
5. [Chapter 5: Data Modeling - Tree-based Models](chapter-5.qmd)
6. [Chapter 6: Data Modeling - KNN](chapter-6.qmd)
7. [Chapter 7: Data Modeling - SVM](chapter-7.qmd)
8. [Chapter 8: Data Modeling - ANN](chapter-8.qmd)
9. [Chapter 9: Data Modeling - Bayesian Inference](chapter-9.qmd)
10. [Chapter 10: Data Modeling - PCA](chapter-10.qmd)
11. [Chapter 11: Data Modeling - Clustering](chapter-11.qmd)
12. [Chapter 12: Debugging and Evaluating](chapter-12.qmd)
